_notes: Canonical local runtime is the pi/extensions/local-llm.ts extension: Mozilla llamafile serves the OpenAI-compatible local LLM endpoint on 127.0.0.1:8082, and Mozilla whisperfile handles local audio transcription. No native build/systemd fallback is canonical. The only supported local LLM is Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-Claude-4.7-Opus-Reasoning-Distilled Q4_K_M (GGUF: gopi87/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-Claude-4.7-Opus-Reasoning-Distilled-Q4_K_M-GGUF).
